scripts.lint: concurrently "cd backend && npm run lint" "cd frontend && npm run lint"
scripts.format: concurrently "cd backend && npm run format" "cd frontend && npm run format"
scripts.ai:eval:compare: cd ai-training/promptfoo && npx promptfoo eval --providers ollama:chiro-no-sft-dpo-v6 ollama:chiro-no-sft-dpo-v5
scripts.ai:eval:safety: cd ai-training/promptfoo && npx promptfoo eval -c suites/clinical-safety.yaml
scripts.ai:eval:redteam: cd ai-training/promptfoo && npx promptfoo eval -c suites/red-flags.yaml
